notes: Fort Bend proposed subdivision - Lakes of Bella Terra Reserve, ZIP 25826 (note: 25826 is a WV ZIP, likely a data anomaly; Lakes of Bella Terra is in Richmond TX 77407/77469). Lakes of Bella Terra is a 725-acre master-planned residential community by Ryko Development with 1,669 homes. This permit likely represents a new reserve/phase of that subdivision. No commercial tenant identified.
